title: The Royal Family Is Cornered
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, King Neptune, Hody Jones, Shirahoshi, Vander Decken, Brook. The core story beat is the royal family is cornered.
scene: The scene centers on the royal family is cornered, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, King Neptune, Hody Jones, Shirahoshi, Vander Decken, Brook driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: H - Hold on a minute, boss...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He used his own crewmate as a shield!! He really is a monster!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Guys... you go and untie the soldiers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could you listen to me?!! Nami-San seems to have vanished off somewhere...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And this water flooding in is sapping all of my strength...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Our deal with this country is broken!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were unable to keep our promise to return all the Hostages unharmed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But first, could you unite the person next to you?

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: crush them all!!! Neptunee army and straw hat pirates alike!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhh...!!! That's... a "flower", from above the sea!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ZOROO!! The water is getting too deep!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Release the ropes!! Take up your weapons!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have a request. Could you get those two out of here for me?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, nobody's going to escape if someone doesn't hold him off, are they...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to get in the way of my coup D'etat...

summary: The Royal Family Is Cornered. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
